name: Apogee Therapeutics, Inc.
business: Apogee Therapeutics is a clinical stage biotechnology company advancing optimized biologics for inflammatory and immunology indications, including atopic dermatitis, asthma, eosinophilic esophagitis, and COPD. Its pipeline includes zumilokibart (anti-IL13), APG279 (zumilokibart + anti-OX40L), APG273 (zumilokibart + anti-TSLP), and APG808 (anti-IL4R), which are designed to overcome limitations of existing therapies through advanced antibody engineering.

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical stage biotechnology company advancing optimized, novel biologics with the potential for differentiated efficacy and dosing in the largest inflammatory and immunology ( I&I ) markets, including for the treatment of atopic dermatitis ( AD ), asthma, eosinophilic esophagitis ( EoE ), chronic obstructive pulmonary disease ( COPD ), and other I&I indications.

catalysts.event: Report APEX Phase 2 Part A maintenance data
catalysts.sentence: We expect to report Part A maintenance data in March 2026.

catalysts.event: Report 16-week topline induction data from APEX Part B
catalysts.sentence: We expect to report 16-week topline induction data from Part B in the second quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Initiate Phase 3 trial in atopic dermatitis
catalysts.sentence: Subject to positive results and regulatory alignment with the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (the FDA ), we plan to initiate a Phase 3 trial in AD in the second half of 2026, enabling a potential launch of zumilokibart for the treatment of AD in 2029.

catalysts.event: Share plans to further evaluate zumilokibart in ASPIRE Phase 2 asthma trial
catalysts.sentence: Based on these results, we anticipate sharing our plans later in 2026 to further evaluate zumilokibart in the ASPIRE Phase 2 asthma trial.

catalysts.event: Announce plans for Phase 2 trial in eosinophilic esophagitis
catalysts.sentence: We expect to announce plans for the Phase 2 trial in EoE in 2026.

catalysts.event: Data readout from APG279 Phase 1b trial
catalysts.sentence: In July 2025, we commenced dosing in the Phase 1b trial of APG279 against DUPIXENT in patients with moderate-to-severe AD, which was upsized from approximately 50 to 80 patients due to a strong patient enrollment, with a data readout expected in the second half of 2026.
We plan to announce additional clinical plans for APG273 in 2026 to support advancement into future combination trials in asthma and COPD.

tamClaims.claim: The global asthma biologics market is forecasted to grow to approximately $16B by 2028.
tamClaims.sentence: The global asthma biologics market is forecasted to grow to approximately $16B by 2028.

tamClaims.claim: It is estimated that 81.6 million people suffer from moderate to severe AD worldwide.
tamClaims.sentence: It is estimated that 81.6 million people suffer from moderate to severe AD worldwide.
